title: anthelis glaucus
intro: Anthelis glaucus, also known as Inula helenium or Elecampane, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Anthelis glaucus include soothing digestive problems, reducing inflammation, and acting as a natural expectorant to relieve congestion. Herbal preparations of Anthelis glaucus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
